application.description: You've completed all education levels and meet the requirements for Brendia Pro® certification. Apply for a review of your work and receive your official certificate.
application.confirmation: I confirm that I have completed all education and am ready for the certification review. I understand that my work will be reviewed before the certificate is issued.
